---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
---

Replace this text with a short bio about yourself. What are you studying? What are you interested in? What do you want to work on?
